title: Water Taxi - King County, Washington
content: Hop aboard the King County Water Taxi for a fast, fun, and affordable escape from Seattle’s traffic. Whether you’re a daily commuter heading to work or a visitor craving a unique Puget Sound adventure, our boats take you from downtown Seattle to West Seattle or Vashon Island in style.
